untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe analysis (weekly/daily/4H hierarchy) and pullback retracement threshold measurement. The allowed indicator set does not support explicit timeframe switching or pullback magnitude detection. Parameters marked [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] are not quantified. Implemented as trend-following proxy using ADX for trend confirmation and SMA for direction alignment, but this does not capture the true pullback-within-trend logic.
translation_notes: Used ADX_14 > 25 to detect established higher timeframe trend. Used SMA_50 crossover as proxy for trend direction reversal (exit condition). Entry logic enforces trend confirmation before pullback trades. Stop loss set conservatively at 2% due to pullback-specific risk profile. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to reflect the dual long/short capability based on higher timeframe trend direction.
